author: Haroen Viaene
body:
* chore(deps): update dependency algolia-frontend-components to v0.0.35 (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#605) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/0bb35784767879b01d6bb173e5a82e3be4d4ddad

 * chore(deps): update dependency browserify to v14.5.0 (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#582) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/855cf5d639b443171c27ecd56d4820dbfc382c5e

 * chore(deps): update dependency http-server to v0.11.1 (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#590) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/9534c1783eb34a3b692f2d5b6c8616c9008dc95e

 * chore: use only yarn (no more npm 👩‍🚒) (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#637) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/b5b0952e14d54863228e20088f3dc3bc01501af3
 * chore(deps): update st (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#625) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/81a30b5af2233e49e39f8dde2d49538bdf77024f
 * chore(docs): change jade to pug (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#615) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/f1ef3b048464bb317656333488bb496052eacd6c, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/613
 * chore(docs): fix interpolation https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/d5919775512f6dc52fc802297c58fc3c7c1c6893
 * chore(docs): remove folder in  (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#616) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/0e9332f5f5b8f90604987b2f6d9e15f688b83fc2
 * docs(init): use toggleFacetRefinement instead (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#622) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/d07614b45f41f224c8c72c18d5eb349f7913b7e3
 * docs(instantiate): use existing signature of toggleRefine (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#621) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/c35bec9878958c2018c129803986984039546463
 * docs: fix InstantSearch link (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#640) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/66dfa0ce85992addea4f0c3f6792a63dea5b9ba2, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/640
 * docs: fix typo on hierarchical facets (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#646) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/940e2c6592a519c1974e4e6681273fbe1b063be6, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/646
 * feat(sffv): throw an error if it's called and the client doesn't have the functions (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#623) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/9002c31a934505a1bd82be8d10bfef3be5366ae0
 * fix(results): remove lodash looping over objects (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#648) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/b1ccd5e423f93d53f0e50a4a82522ab174d80e41, closes https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/issues/258
 * fix(ua): change the User-Agent to use the new specs lib (version) (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#647) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/ec2c6ee546c179ab7e82aeecd5428a4959d7aacd
 * refactor(events): replace util.inherits by inline (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#653) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/0e227f9b40cc3f4272874c6838a450db9658477f
 * test(client): update index name (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#619) https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/ba68a3c4a68300363e2c37063f496d97fa866192
 * Update README.md https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js/commit/808a736d2fed82a5d53e13a75312cf0fe38d365d
